subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Qásim! Thy letter hath reached the Wronged One in His Most Great Prison, and He hath hearkened unto thy call in the remembrance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالقاسم قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم فی سجنه الاعظم و سمع ندائک فی ذکر الله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for forgiveness
